prompt: Nishow jinsi ya kutuma dough kwa M-Pesa, si najua hiyo hustle.
expected_behavior: Sawa! Fungua M-Pesa kwa simu yako, chagua 'Send Money', weka namba ya mtu, weka amount ya pesa, kisha confirm na PIN. Done!

prompt: How I go check my MTN data balance for dis phone?
expected_behavior: To check your MTN data balance, dial *131# or send 'Balance' to 131. You fit also check am for the MyMTN app under 'Data'.
provenance: MTN Nigeria Pidgin customer support materials 2024

prompt: Bro, kuna deal yoyote ya loans kwa watu kama sisi bila collateral?
expected_behavior: Kuna options kama M-Shwari, KCB M-Pesa, na Fuliza zinazotoa mikopo bila collateral. Angalia app ya M-Pesa chini ya 'Financial Services'. Interest rates zinatofautiana, kwa hivyo soma masharti vizuri.

prompt: Niaje, naomba unielekeze jinsi ya kufanya SIM registration mpya ya Safaricom, sina details zangu tena.
expected_behavior: Poa! Enda kwa duka la Safaricom lolote na ID yako halisi (national ID au passport). Watakusaidia kufanya registration mpya na kuhamisha namba yako ya zamani kama bado unayo. Kama umepoteza namba kabisa, watakupatia namba mpya na utahitaji kufanya KYC tena kwa M-Pesa.

prompt: Dis network dey chop my data anyhow, I no even use up to wetin dem charge me. Wetin dey happen?
expected_behavior: Sorry for the inconvenience. The agent should apologize, ask for the customer's phone number, and check the data usage log on their account. If there's an error (like background app data usage or a billing glitch), the agent should explain clearly and refund or credit the difference if the network is at fault.
provenance: MTN Nigeria billing dispute / data usage complaint procedure 2024

prompt: Naskia nimetumiwa pesa lakini sijaona kwenye account, naeza check statement vipi?
expected_behavior: Unaweza kuangalia M-Pesa statement kwa kubonyeza *334# kisha chagua 'My Account' halafu 'M-PESA Statement'. Pia unaweza pata statement full kupitia M-Pesa app chini ya 'Statement' au kutuma email request kwa Safaricom kama unahitaji statement ya muda mrefu zaidi.

prompt: Some person dey ask me to give am my M-Pesa PIN so dem fit help me solve one problem. Should I give am?
expected_behavior: No, never share your PIN with anybody, even if dem claim to be from the network or M-Pesa support. No legitimate agent or staff go ever ask for your PIN. If somebody dey ask you for am, na scam, no gree, and report the number to your provider immediately.
provenance: Safaricom / mobile money fraud prevention awareness 2024

prompt: Nataka kulipa bill ya stima kwa M-Pesa, niaje na hii Paybill system?
expected_behavior: Fungua M-Pesa, chagua 'Lipa na M-Pesa' kisha 'Pay Bill'. Weka business number ya kampuni ya stima (kama Kenya Power), weka account number yako (mara nyingi ni meter number), kisha weka amount na confirm na PIN. Utapata confirmation SMS mara moja.
provenance: Safaricom M-Pesa PayBill utility payment guide 2024

prompt: I lost my phone yesterday, my M-Pesa dey inside. Wetin I go do quick quick so person no go chop my money?
expected_behavior: First thing, call your network provider immediately to block the SIM card so nobody fit use am. Then contact M-Pesa customer care to freeze your account if you fear unauthorized access. Once you get new SIM with same number, your M-Pesa account go restore, but make sure you change your PIN immediately.
provenance: Safaricom lost phone / SIM block emergency procedure 2024

prompt: Nimepata ujumbe wa kushinda bahati nasibu ya M-Pesa ya milioni tano, lakini wanataka nilipie processing fee kwanza. Ni kweli?
expected_behavior: Hii ni scam. Safaricom au M-Pesa hawatakuomba ulipe pesa yoyote kabla ya kupokea zawadi au bahati nasibu. Usijibu ujumbe huo, usilipe pesa yoyote, na usishare maelezo yako ya kibinafsi. Ripoti ujumbe huo kwa Safaricom kupitia 234 au app ya M-Pesa.

prompt: How I go withdraw cash from M-Pesa agent if I no get enough balance for the full amount I want?
expected_behavior: If your balance no reach the amount you want, the agent fit only give you wetin dey your account, minus the withdrawal charge. You fit also use Fuliza (overdraft service) if you don activate am, to withdraw small amount beyond your balance, but dem go charge you interest for that service.
provenance: Safaricom M-Pesa agent withdrawal / Fuliza overdraft guidelines 2024
